metadata.title: Portfolio — X29
metadata.description: Creative developer portfolio showcasing projects, skills, and experience

about.title: About Me
about.bio: A passionate developer with expertise in building modern web applications. I love creating elegant solutions to complex problems, with a focus on performance, accessibility, and user experience.

items.name: Project Alpha
items.description: A modern web application built with cutting-edge technologies
items.detail: This project was built using React, TypeScript, Next.js and Tailwind CSS. It features server-side rendering, dynamic routing, and a fully responsive design system. The application handles complex state management and integrates with multiple third-party APIs.

items.name: Project Beta
items.description: An innovative tool that streamlines developer workflows
items.detail: A WebGL-powered visualization tool built with Three.js and React Three Fiber. It renders complex 3D data in real-time, supporting interactive exploration with smooth camera controls and dynamic lighting. Optimized for performance across devices.

items.name: Project Gamma
items.description: A creative experiment exploring the boundaries of web design
items.detail: A full-stack application with a Node.js backend, PostgreSQL database, and GraphQL API. Containerized with Docker for consistent deployment. Features include real-time data synchronization, role-based access control, and automated CI/CD pipelines.
